title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for Curren Chan's second Sprinters
Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Racecourse is livelier today than ever
before.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I heard they're gonna show a special
broadcast on the big screen before the race!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Everyone, be quiet! It's about to start!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Buono, everyone! ♪ For today's meal—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No! We're s'posed to be talkin' 'bout how excited
we are for today's race!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! ♪ Um... There are so many spectators
today!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
Have a good race, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wowie, now that's what I call a cheer! Thank you
so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We're all pleased as punch to see so many of y'all
out here to support us! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Bigger is better, after all! That goes
for your cheering voices and everything else! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And since I'm the biggest star here today, I think that mea—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
STOP! Not. One. More. Word! As the class
representative, it's m—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yessiree! And I'm as big as anyone! That's why this
race's in the bag! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: GYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I! Wanted! To! Be! The! LEADER!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Well, I'm ready to put up a big fight today
too, so watch out. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hold on! Me too! I'm gonna wiiin!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! As you can see, we're all very excited. And
now, it's time for the Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We're all so happy to have so many people
watching today. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now, I've got a personal message for all the
people here at the racecourse and those of you
watching from home...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll be taking alllll of your hearts today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hey! That's a foul! No false starts allowed!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whoopsie! You caught me! On that note...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: We can't wait to hear everyone cheering! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oooh! I'm starting to get excited!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I knew everyone's eyes would be on Curren
Chan—she planned the whole thing! I'm excited to
see how this turns out!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan Follower
text_block_list.text:
Cute Curren Chan!
Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
What in the world is going on? It feels like we're
at the Arima Kinen or something.

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: You don't know? Try looking up "Cutie ♪ Derby"!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: ..."Cutie ♪ Derby"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tap, tap, ta-tap, tap...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's this?! It's...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Sooooo cuuuuute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Wow. We can hear the fans all the way over
here.
choice_data_list: That's the effect of the Cutie ♪ Derby.
That's the effect of the Cutie ♪ Derby.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I guess you're right. It's just like I
planned—no, it's even better.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We've got all eyes on us. We've got the absolute
best competitors. We've set up the perfect
shining stage...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now, all that's left is for me to become the most
beloved.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is unusually nervous, though it
comes as no surprise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is the day we find out if the path she—we—chose was the right one.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I just wanna ask you one thing. Today... Am I—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Yeah, that's perfect. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then, here I go! I'm gonna deliver my cuteness to
everyone!
